items.headline: Tree work sought for broken pine branch in Limpsfield
items.summary: A planning application has been made to remove a branch from a protected Corsican pine at Hunters End on Uvedale Road, Limpsfield. The branch has twisted and half broken, and now hangs over the property, with work proposed to cut it back to the main stem.
